items_all.title_zh: 資料來源：祖克柏敦促高層探索 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 合作夥伴關係，因為 Arena 預測應用程式的目標是 1 億年齡在 18-34 歲之間的每月活躍「預測者」（Mike Isaac/紐約時報）

items_all.title: AWS hikes prices for Nvidia GPUs in its EC2 Capacity Blocks service, which let businesses rent AI compute in advance, by 20%; Trainium chip pricing is unchanged (Catherine Perloff/The Information)
items_all.title_original: AWS hikes prices for Nvidia GPUs in its EC2 Capacity Blocks service, which let businesses rent AI compute in advance, by 20%; Trainium chip pricing is unchanged (Catherine Perloff/The Information)
items_all.title_en: AWS hikes prices for Nvidia GPUs in its EC2 Capacity Blocks service, which let businesses rent AI compute in advance, by 20%; Trainium chip pricing is unchanged (Catherine Perloff/The Information)
items_all.title_zh: AWS 將其 EC2 容量區塊服務中的 Nvidia GPU 價格提高了 20%，該服務允許企業提前租用 AI 運算； Trainium 晶片定價保持不變（Catherine Perloff/The Information）
items_all.title_bilingual: AWS 將其 EC2 容量區塊服務中的 Nvidia GPU 價格提高了 20%，該服務允許企業提前租用 AI 運算； Trainium 晶片定價保持不變（Catherine Perloff/The Information） / AWS hikes prices for Nvidia GPUs in its EC2 Capacity Blocks service, which let businesses rent AI compute in advance, by 20%; Trainium chip pricing is unchanged (Catherine Perloff/The Information)

items_all.title_original: Oracle's stock fell 19% this week, the steepest weekly drop since a 20% plunge in August 2001, amid concerns about its debt load and AI investments (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items_all.title_en: Oracle's stock fell 19% this week, the steepest weekly drop since a 20% plunge in August 2001, amid concerns about its debt load and AI investments (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items_all.title_zh: 由於對其債務負擔和人工智慧投資的擔憂，甲骨文股價本週下跌 19%，這是自 2001 年 8 月暴跌 20% 以來的最大單週跌幅 (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items_all.title_bilingual: 由於對其債務負擔和人工智慧投資的擔憂，甲骨文股價本週下跌 19%，這是自 2001 年 8 月暴跌 20% 以來的最大單週跌幅 (Jordan Novet/CNBC) / Oracle's stock fell 19% this week, the steepest weekly drop since a 20% plunge in August 2001, amid concerns about its debt load and AI investments (Jordan Novet/CNBC)

items_all.title_original: Sources: Russian hackers were behind a 2025 ransomware attack on Jaguar Land Rover that used "mind-blowing" encryption and cost UK's economy an estimated $2.5B (New York Times)

items_all.title_zh: 資料來源：俄羅斯駭客是 2025 年針對捷豹路虎的勒索軟體攻擊的幕後黑手，該攻擊使用了「令人震驚」的加密技術，導致英國經濟損失估計為 2.5B 美元（《紐約時報》）

items_all.title: A study of 408 teens in Australia finds 80%+ were still using social media three months after the ban came into force, citing inadequate age verification checks (Anna Bawden/The Guardian)
items_all.title_original: A study of 408 teens in Australia finds 80%+ were still using social media three months after the ban came into force, citing inadequate age verification checks (Anna Bawden/The Guardian)
items_all.title_en: A study of 408 teens in Australia finds 80%+ were still using social media three months after the ban came into force, citing inadequate age verification checks (Anna Bawden/The Guardian)
items_all.title_zh: 一項針對澳洲 408 名青少年的研究發現，在禁令生效三個月後，80% 以上的青少年仍在使用社群媒體，理由是年齡驗證檢查不充分（Anna Bawden/衛報）
items_all.title_bilingual: 一項針對澳洲 408 名青少年的研究發現，在禁令生效三個月後，80% 以上的青少年仍在使用社群媒體，理由是年齡驗證檢查不充分（Anna Bawden/衛報） / A study of 408 teens in Australia finds 80%+ were still using social media three months after the ban came into force, citing inadequate age verification checks (Anna Bawden/The Guardian)

items_all.title_en: OpenAI says 97.9% of its employees are now using Codex, up from ~40% in August 2025; non-developer Codex usage is up 137x for individuals and 12x within OpenAI (Thomas Claburn/The Register)
items_all.title_zh: OpenAI 表示，目前 97.9% 的員工在使用 Codex，高於 2025 年 8 月的約 40%；非開發人員 Codex 的使用率在個人中增加了 137 倍，在 OpenAI 中增加了 12 倍（Thomas Claburn/The Register）
